report.nakshatra_info: Birth Star: Rohini (Pada 3) - Kama Pada (Air/Gemini quality)

yogas.name: Raja Yoga (L4 & L5)
yogas.description: Connection of Kendra Lord (4) and Trikona Lord (5).

yogas.name: Vipareeta Raja Yoga
yogas.description: Lord of 6th, 8th, or 12th house in another dusthana. Vice becomes virtue.

yogas.name: Chandra Adhi Yoga
yogas.description: Benefics in 6th, 7th, 8th from Moon. Leadership and fame.

quality.Weak: Mercury is Functional Malefic, Jupiter is Functional Malefic

yogas.name: Parivartana Yoga: House 3 ↔ House 6
yogas.description: Khala Parivartana - Mixed exchange with one difficult house (cross exchange)

quality.Weak: Mercury is Functional Malefic, Jupiter is Functional Malefic
